examples: A kind of tired, imploring expression masked his thin face, and there was an unyouthful sag about his shoulders.
She gave him an imploring look.
Frank looked at Jim with imploring eyes.
Kirsten Gillibrand also wrote to LaHood, imploring him to redirect the funds to New York.
Naturally, agents are imploring the union to not allow for a no-negotiation process for rookies.
